title: 3D Gaussian Splatting: Compression & Optimization
subtitle: From Gaussian Splatting Compression to Self-Organizing Grids

modules.title: Foundations of 3DGS
modules.description: NeRF vs 3DGS, Gaussian math, the rendering pipeline, training via differentiable rasterization, and key extensions.

modules.title: Evaluation & Survey
modules.description: Standardized metrics (PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS), benchmark datasets, and why cross-paper comparisons usually fail.

modules.title: Compaction Strategies
modules.description: Attribute reduction, improved densification & pruning, structural modifications (ScaffoldGS, HAC), and rendering improvements.

modules.title: Grid-Based Sorting
modules.description: Reshaping Gaussians into 2D grids, quality metrics (DPQ, GAF, GDF), and the SOM → SSM → LAS → FLAS algorithm family.

modules.title: Permutation Learning & Encoding
modules.description: Neural permutation learning (GradSort, ShuffleSoftSort), quantization, vector quantization, entropy coding, and the full SOG pipeline.

modules.title: End-to-End 3DGS Production Pipelines
modules.description: Structure from Motion with GLOMAP, depth-prior initialization, Sparse Adam, and the full .splat binary format — from YouTube video to deployable web viewer.

modules.title: GPU Architecture & Kernel Optimization
modules.description: CUDA thread hierarchy, SIMT execution, CGMA ratio, roofline analysis, memory coalescing, and profiling with torch.profiler and Perfetto.

modules.title: Enterprise Application Patterns
modules.description: Domain logic layering, data mapping strategies, concurrency patterns, and distribution patterns for production ML systems.
